programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges the competitors to leave the plates behind and serve everything in a bowl; the returning champion takes on chefs Martel Stone and Evelyn Garcia to win over judges Antonia Lofaso and Aaron May in Flavortown's fiercest competition yet.

programme.title: Wildcard Kitchen
programme.desc: Eric Adjepong invites Tiffani Faison, Christian Petroni, and Kelsey Murphy to put their reputations and $5,000 of their own money on the line; it's the clash of the champions as these three friends try to prove they still have what it takes to win big.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes the four remaining culinary hopefuls for two epic semifinal battles; the last two chefs go head-to-head in the championship showdown, and only one chef will claim the Tournament of Champions VII belt, the coveted title, and $150,000.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges the competitors to leave the plates behind and serve everything in a bowl; the returning champion takes on chefs Martel Stone and Evelyn Garcia to win over judges Antonia Lofaso and Aaron May in Flavortown's fiercest competition yet.

programme.title: Wildcard Kitchen
programme.desc: Eric Adjepong invites Tiffani Faison, Christian Petroni, and Kelsey Murphy to put their reputations and $5,000 of their own money on the line; it's the clash of the champions as these three friends try to prove they still have what it takes to win big.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: POOF! Bye Bye Under Eye Bags!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America
programme.sub-title: Celeb Heroes vs Villains: Reality Stars on Mars
programme.desc: The recruits compete in a scavenger hunt race for ingredients before chefs Jeff Mauro and Antonia Lofaso challenge them to dive into making squid ink seafood pasta; the two bottom recruits must make fresh pasta and sauce in a blind challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Creating dishes with homegrown herbs including lemon-rosemary scones, French onion soup with fresh thyme, panzanella salad with basil, raita with salted naan wedges.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks up a tasty selection of brilliant bowl food; she gets the ball rolling with chicken meatball polenta bowls, teriyaki mushroom and egg bowls and shrimp and veggie grain bowls; plus, Ree whips up cute no-churn ice cream bowls.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond dishes up new favorites that add wow to weeknights, including a new take on cheeseburger sliders, a quick skillet of rigatoni with broccolini and sausage, an easy tomato pie, and pretzel-crusted chicken strips.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond puts a fresh spin on dinner with a one-pan chicken cauliflower skillet, saucy rustic turkey meatball pasta and an extra-fast orange ginger steak stir-fry; she also cooks grilled pita pizzas piled high with vegetables for a solo supper.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond spices things up with her favorite speedy Cajun tequila shrimp lettuce wraps, then she turns up the heat with peppers, shells and cheese, a colossal mountain burger, and a jalapeño blackberry margarita with a kick.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is adding her fresh garden ingredients to recipes, starting with moist chocolate zucchini muffins; Ree also makes easy best ever pesto, a tomato sandwich, a green goddess chopped salad and spicy herb garden butter.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts share recipes inspired by their first food jobs. Sunny Anderson revisits her drive-thru days with Nacogdoches Cherry Limeade, Geoffrey Zakarian fries up Bistro Steak Frites and Alex Guarnaschelli remakes her first Fish with Salsa Verde.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kitchen is sharing essential rules for culinary success, including how to cook pork, seafood and a classic omelet. Plus, special guests Bryon Gomez and Nini Nguyen from Food Network's Hot List 2025 stop by to share their own cooking rules.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer tasks the bakers with creating a visually stunning chocolate sculptural piece along with a complementary baked element; chocolatier Amaury Guichon joins Duff Goldman to judge the chefs' technical precision and creative storytelling.

programme.title: Wildcard Kitchen
programme.desc: Eric Adjepong invites "24 in 24" hosts Michael Symon and Esther Choi and champion Marcel Vigneron for a late-night culinary poker face-off. With $15,000 of their own money on the line, which chef will fall prey to Eric's deliciously deceptive wildcards?

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wildcard Kitchen
programme.desc: Eric Adjepong hosts a night of winner-takes-all culinary poker as Maneet Chauhan returns to defend her winning title against Mei Lin and Aaron Sanchez; the knives are sharpened, the heat is on, and only one legendary chef will walk away with $30,000.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wildcard Kitchen
programme.desc: After midnight, Eric Adjepong invites top chefs to bring $5,000 of their own money, and play his culinary card game. Eric deals out the dish, time allotted and mandatory ingredients, but it's each chef's secret wildcard that makes or breaks the game.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wildcard Kitchen
programme.desc: Eric Adjepong brings three of the wildest chefs he knows to throw down in his late-night culinary game. Brian Shenanigans Malarkey, Maria Rebel Mazon, and Justin Wildcard Warner bring $5,000 of their own cash to take home a potential $15,000 pot.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Indian specialist Aarthi Sampath takes on the Windy City's Zoe Schor in a battle on ladies' night; TV host Daphne Oz and Los Angeles chef Michael Voltaggio taste and pick a winner to take on Bobby Flay.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Animal instincts run high as Alex Guarnaschelli ("Chopped") and Food Network star Eddie Jackson keep an eagle eye on Nashville chef Dale Levitski and Indian-born Manish Tyagi.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two Italian-cuisine cutthroats, chefs Adam Leonti and Anthony Scolaro, face off for a shot at scuffing up Bobby's record with a loss.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Formidable duo Michael Symon and Giada De Laurentiis reunite to continue their winning streak against Bobby Flay, bringing in Italian master chefs Jessica Gamble and Fabrizio Schenardi to challenge Bobby with a dish he's never won before.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Chef Anne Burrell brings rising star comedian Jaboukie Young White from The Daily Show to hit Bobby Flay with some breaking news; Italian expert chefs Nicole Karr and David Benstock are recruited.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli and comedian Roy Wood Jr. deliver a double dose of smack talk as chefs Joe Flamm and Dafne Mejia give Bobby Flay a run for his money.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: We are joined by Eddie Jackson and country musician Wynonna Judd; chefs John Howie and Bobby Marcotte battle Bobby Flay with a Southern staple.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Katie Lee Biegel and actor Nicholas Braun taunt Bobby Flay with a couple of young chefs, Hanna Haar and Peter McQuaid, who are gunning for the win.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer challenges the chefs to craft a large-format dessert with a decorative sugar element that embodies their assigned element, earth, air, fire, water, or space; Duff Goldman and Jacques Torres judge the striking sugar showpieces.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Bobby Flay gets shaken and stirred when Taraji P. Henson and Amanda Freitag try to mix up a defeat with pastry chefs Maurice Shelton and Cristina Vázquez.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Michael Voltaggio and rock star Gavin Rossdale aim to bring Bobby Flay's house down with chefs Matthew Jordan and Ilana Cordero.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Sara Haines teams up with Food Network's Anne Burrell to try to bring Bobby Flay down; chefs Jonathan Dearden and Scott Drewno go head-to-head for a shot at Bobby's crown.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.sub-title: If I Dip, You Dip, We Dip
programme.desc: Ana Gasteyer and chef Josh Capon try to take Bobby down; chefs Sarah Cloyd and Danny Brown are looking to humor themselves with a win.

programme.desc: Eric Adjepong and Jaymee Sire team up with chefs Solomon Johnson and Niema Digrazia to challenge Bobby Flay with a dish from the African Diaspora.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay

programme.title: Emma: Natural Relief for Bloating, Constipation & Gut Imbalance
programme.desc: Tired of bloating or gut issues that won't go away?; discovering the root cause-and how Emma can help eliminate methane-producing archaea, reset digestion and restore balance naturally.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race
programme.sub-title: David vs. Goliath: This Is Food Truck Heaven?
programme.desc: For the first time, Tyler Florence pits four food truck pros against five food truck rookies in an epic David vs. Goliath battle to win $50,000.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Ramsay goes to Pennsylvania to help the owners of Bella Luna, an Italian restaurant, to salvage their dream.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Ramsay goes to Massachusetts to help a married couple improve their restaurant, Barefoot Bob's.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to transform El Cantito, a Puerto Rican restaurant, that is struggling to keep the business afloat with malfunctioning equipment, a small staff and pandemic-induced financial strain.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay heads to Max's Bar & Grill to help the restaurant before the divorced owners' business crumbles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: Alex asks four chefs to create plates that go great with a cup of joe; it's time to please the judges with a whole lot of cheese; things get nutty when the finalists dish up something chock-full of nuts.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli challenges four chefs to roll up their sleeves and get ready to skewer their competition, but it's not long before one chef rolls out of the parking lot; the final two competitors whip up an exciting dessert for the judges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: The four competing chefs must haul in big carts for a big breakfast buffet; they ditch the surf and double up on turf when Alex Guarnaschelli challenges them to create turf and turf dishes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Alton Brown is at it again; the chefs in his Maniacal Baskets tournament are seriously tripped up by a canned wonder in the appetizer round, and a shelf-stable surprise in the entree basket is unlikely to be a crowd pleaser.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: The competitors brace for zany, brainy ingredients courtesy of Alton Brown, starting with a super stinky item in the appetizer basket; in the second round, a unique style of apple pie may have the competitors asking, why.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chefs get a big surprise ingredient with a challenging texture; in the entrée round, some sticky beans and a peculiar salad are shockers; the final chefs attempt to make winning desserts from the wild ingredients in the third basket.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Alton Brown and his fans curate maniacal baskets for an epic tournament, including a fermented Japanese dish and a strange banana product in the entree basket; the two chefs who make it to the dessert round must work with a fluffy, porky surprise.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: In the wild conclusion of Alton Brown's Maniacal Baskets tournament, Alton has a big announcement that's sure to get the chefs fired up; for the entree round, the chefs open the baskets to discover one of the items staring back at them.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Four skilled sushi chefs compete to create appetizers with precision and potato chips; the chefs in the entrée round get creative with a prized fish and some candy, while choices in the dessert round impress the judges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Native American chefs who revere indigenous culinary traditions compete in a first-of-its-kind battle. Every basket is packed with ingredients known and loved in native communities, like sumac and whitefish for the first round.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Four chefs take on a cooking experience and aim to prove that they can roll with whatever they find in the appetizer basket, including gnocchi in a bread bowl; the competitors find bogus pork and rabbit meat in the entrée basket.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: In this special competition, chefs with a deep understanding of food insecurity make meals with kids in mind; the breakfast, lunch and dinner baskets are packed with family-friendly flavors to prompt nutritious and satisfying culinary creations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Native American chefs who revere indigenous culinary traditions compete in a first-of-its-kind battle. Every basket is packed with ingredients known and loved in native communities, like sumac and whitefish for the first round.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
